hero.subtitle1: I help turn business ideas into

about.label: About Me
about.title: Business Analyst & Web Developer
about.description: I'm a Business Analyst with a background in Information Systems. I focus on translating business needs into clear, structured solutions. With hands-on frontend experience, I'm able to validate ideas quickly, communicate effectively with developers, and ensure solutions stay aligned with user and business goals.

business-analysis.title: Business & System Analysis
business-analysis.description: Analyze business processes, identify problems, and translate requirements into clear system and feature definitions.

frontend-development.title: Frontend Web Development
frontend-development.description: Build clean, responsive, and user-friendly web interfaces using modern frontend technologies like React and Next.js.

ui-implementation.title: UI Implementation from Requirements
ui-implementation.description: Turn business and user requirements into practical, intuitive, and functional user interfaces that align with real business goals.

contact.title: CONTACT
contact.subtitle: Get in Touch
contact.description: Have a project in mind or want to collaborate? I'd love to hear from you.

form.title: Send a Message
form.description: Fill out the form below and I'll get back to you soon.
form.name: Your Name
form.subject: Subject
form.error: Failed to send message. Please try again.

errors.messageLen: Message must be at least 10 characters

caseStudy.title: All Projects
caseStudy.description: A collection of web development projects ranging from business analysis to full-stack applications.
